module.name: no-throw-literal
module.description: Disallow throwing literals, objects, or templates; always throw a new Error instance.

scenarios.name: should allow throwing a new Error instance
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement

scenarios.name: should allow throwing a new custom Error subclass
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement

scenarios.name: should report throwing a string literal
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement

scenarios.name: should report throwing a plain object literal
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement

scenarios.name: should report throwing a template literal
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement

scenarios.name: should report throwing a numeric literal
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the throw statement
